tool_args.label: NYCT Committee Actions and Presentations Summary for February 2023
tool_args.raw_text: NYCT Committee ACTIONS and PRESENTATIONS SUMMARY for FEBRUARY 2023. The Procurement Agenda this month includes 1 action for a proposed estimated expenditure of $7.2M. Modification to extend maintenance services for buses and depots equipped with Bus Camera Security Systems for an additional 11 months.

payload.title: NYCT Committee ACTIONS and PRESENTATIONS SUMMARY for FEBRUARY 2023
payload.description: Procurement agenda for February 2023 NYC Transit Committee meeting including 1 noncompetitive modification action for $7.2M to extend Bus Camera Security System maintenance contract with Seon Design

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.raw_text: Modification to extend maintenance services for buses and depots equipped with Bus Camera Security Systems for an additional 11 months. tool_args.label: BCSS Function Description
tool_args.raw_text: The BCSS allows video images to be captured on buses and then wirelessly uploaded along with a system health report from the buses to depot servers during the refueling process for use in managing data and ensuring proper operation of the onboard equipment.

payload.claim_text: The BCSS allows video images to be captured on buses and then wirelessly uploaded along with a system health report from the buses to depot servers during the refueling process for use in managing data and ensuring proper operation of the onboard equipment.
payload.subject: Bus Camera Security System (BCSS)
payload.description: Description of how the BCSS system functions

tool_args.label: Competitive Bidding Exemption
tool_args.raw_text: COMPETITIVE BIDDING REQUIREMENTS: The procurement actions in Schedules A, B, C, and D are subject to the competitive bidding requirements of PAL 1209 or 1265-a relating to contracts for the purchase of goods or public work. Procurement actions in the remaining Schedules are not subject to these requirements.

payload.claim_text: The procurement actions in Schedules A, B, C, and D are subject to the competitive bidding requirements of PAL 1209 or 1265-a relating to contracts for the purchase of goods or public work. Procurement actions in the remaining Schedules are not subject to these requirements.

payload.description: Schedule I modifications are not subject to competitive bidding requirements
